about.title: About Chengtai
about.introSubtitle: Jiaxing, China — a 35,000 sqm studio building precision mirrors for global hospitality, retail, and residential brands.
about.companyIntroFallbackLead: Established in 2005, Jiaxing Chengtai Mirror Co., Ltd. is a premier manufacturer of LED, bathroom, and full-body mirrors.
about.companyIntroFallbackBody: From a single production line to an integrated 35,000 sqm facility, our mirrors now reach more than 60 countries — built to the specifications of projects that demand consistent quality at scale.
